title: MediSave Care
text:
MediSave Care - SupportGoWhere
MediSave Care
Share link
Allows Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents with severe disability to make monthly cash withdrawals from their own and/or their spouse’s MediSave Account for long-term care.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Withdraw up to $200 per month
Apply through AIC's eService Portal (eFASS)
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Withdraw up to $200 per month from your own and/or your spouse's MediSave Account for long-term care.

Withdrawal amounts are dependent on the care recipient and/or their spouse’s MediSave Account balance

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents

Aged 30 and above

Assessed by an MOH-accredited assessor to be unable to perform 3 out of the following 6 Activities of Daily Living (ADLs):

Washing

Dressing

Feeding

Toileting

Walking or moving around

Transferring

MediSave Account balance of at least $5,000

How to apply?

Contact an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor for a severe disability assessment. See list of assessors.

Log in to AIC’s eService portal (eFASS) with your Singpass to submit a claim application.

Where can I find help?

View more details

AIC hotline: 1800 650 6060

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit the AIC Link branch nearest to you

Scheme last updated 23 Sep 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
